title: OmniWound Monthly Pulse - April 2026
excerpt: How CMS's 2026 skin substitute payment overhaul is reshaping reimbursement for office-based and mobile wound care providers. Plus: new research showing standardized care bundles cut healing time nearly in half, a clinical guide to identifying and managing biofilm in chronic wounds, and what's happening at SAWC Spring 2026 in Charlotte.

title: OmniWound Monthly Pulse — Issue #1
excerpt: Welcome to the first issue! Learn about default values to speed up documentation, major Medicare cost controls on wound care products, and SNF rate increases.
